titleStmt.title: SII 18.212: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 212. (B.K. No. 89 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: North beam of the navaraṅgamaṇḍapa in the temple of Purasiddhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 22nd year of the reign of Siṁhaṇadēva, Vikṛita, Jyēshṭha śu. Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1230, May 27, Monday, f.d.t. ·55. The lunar eclipse occurred on the following Tuesday. It registers a gift of two gadyāṇas made by Jāyidēva-Nāyaka son of Rā[vu]vāṇeya-Nāyaka, for burning a perpetual lamp to god Siddhēśvara of anādiyagrahāra Hāvēri. Kannuva-Nāyaka is stated to be the protector of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpacakravartti śrīsiṁhaṇadēva varṣada 22 ḍeneya vikritasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa su puṇṇami sōmavāra sōma grahaṇadaṁdu śrīmatu
yakajīvarakṣapāḷaka rāyanāyakagajasiṁha diḍagārāṭa vaṁṭa rāvuvāṇeya nāyakara suputrāṁ jāyidēvanāyaka śrīmadanādiyagrahāraṁ hāvēriya Read tram.
ddhēsvaradēva naṁdādīvigege Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevaṁtāgi biṭṭa gadyāṇa yeraḍu pratipāḷaka kannuvanāyakaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī siddhanātha śaraṇu .
Digital edition of SII 18.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
